title: rudbeckia triloba var. triloba
intro: Rudbeckia triloba var. triloba, also known as the three-lobed coneflower, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers with dark centers and three-lobed petals. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities that can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Rudbeckia triloba var. triloba include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
